title: parathelypteris cystopteroides
intro: Parathelypteris cystopteroides, also known as the wood fern or marsh fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parathelypteris cystopteroides include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves or rhizome in hot water or a solvent.
